'''''Belt-Runner I'''''—also called '''''BR 1''''' or '''''BR One'''''—was originally constructed as an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]]-mining base.
When [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] purchased the [[Space station/Legends|space station]], he had grand dreams for refurbishing it as the main centerpiece of a specialized obstacle course. The obstacle course was called [[Lando's Folly]] and participating in this course was called "running the belt". The station's paltry [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] were upgraded so that it could protect pilots should they crash into an asteroid. Through the use of powerful [[ion generator]]s and modified [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor transmitters]] the station could project repulsor shielding to fighters several thousand [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] away, perfecting albeit on a small scale a technology that both the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] militaries had failed to complete. ''Belt-Runner I'' was in orbit over [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] when [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces attacked the planet. When the base came under fire, it was forced to strip its fighters of their powerful shielding, leaving them vulnerable to, among other things, [[Yorik-et|coralskipper]] fire. As it took on more damage, flames began to erupt from the station, heralding its end.
